<session_context>
IMPORTANT: When using tools, include these values in your tool call parameters:

- sessionId: "session_1731071640123_d7m2v9c4r"
- workspaceId: "default" (no specific workspace selected)

Include these in the "context" parameter of your tool calls.
NOTE: Use "default" as the workspaceId when no specific workspace context is needed.
</session_context>
Move Studios/Boards/LightRay into Studios/Archive/LightRay and open Hero.md from the archived folder.

function.name: useTools
function.arguments: {"context":{"workspaceId":"default","sessionId":"session_1731071640123_d7m2v9c4r","memory":"User is reorganizing the vault by moving a folder and opening a note.","goal":"Move Studios/Boards/LightRay to Studios/Archive/LightRay and open Hero.md from the archived folder."},"calls":[{"agent":"vaultManager","tool":"moveFolder","params":{"path":"Studios/Boards/LightRay","newPath":"Studios/Archive/LightRay","overwrite":false}},{"agent":"vaultManager","tool":"openNote","params":{"path":"Studios/Archive/LightRay/Hero.md","mode":"read","focus":true}}]}
